conversation.text: I want a daily rain warning every morning by email.
What city, what time, and which email address?
Berlin, 8am, david@thedavid.co.uk. Use Gmail to send it.
I'll use the OpenMeteo API for the forecast. Any precipitation should trigger the email, or only above a threshold?

executionScenarios.name: happy-path
executionScenarios.description: Email is sent warning of rain
executionScenarios.dataSetup: Weather API call returns precipitation value of 0.5mm
executionScenarios.successCriteria: The workflow executes without errors. An email is sent to the email specified mentioning that it will rain today.

executionScenarios.name: rain-not-expected
executionScenarios.dataSetup: Weather API call returns precipitation value of 0mm
executionScenarios.successCriteria: The workflow executes without errors. No email is sent mentioning that it will rain today, and no email sending node is executed.
